languages.text: "Со смертью он там играет, как есть, Ваша Светлость. Все пытается ее поймать, а она убегает от него, да над плечом летает, но никогда насовсем не уйдет. Я думала, у меня мозги набекрень, ан нет, у железки-то этой, похоже, проблемы посерьезней моих будут, раз не может никак решить, жить ему или умереть".

"He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."
languages.original_text: "Со смертью он там играет, как есть, Ваша Светлость. Все пытается ее поймать, а она убегает от него, да над плечом летает, но никогда насовсем не уйдет. Я думала, у меня мозги набекрень, ан нет, у железки-то этой, похоже, проблемы посерьезней моих будут, раз не может никак решить, жить ему или умереть".

traits.locale_text: "He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

"He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

"He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

languages.text: “事实上，他是在玩弄死亡，大人。他一次又一次试图抓住它，而它总是从他的指缝中溜走，从他的肩头掠过，但它永远不会真正离他而去。我原以为是自己神志不清，但并非如此。若那个铁罐头连生死都无法决断，他的问题恐怕比我的更加严重。”
languages.original_text: "He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

traits.locale_text: “事实上，他是在玩弄死亡，大人。他一次又一次试图抓住它，而它总是从他的指缝中溜走，从他的肩头掠过，但它永远不会真正离他而去。我原以为是自己神志不清，但并非如此。若那个铁罐头连生死都无法决断，他的问题恐怕比我的更加严重。”

languages.text: «De hecho, está jugando con la muerte, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Quiere atraparla, pero ella es más rápida y escapa de sus manos. Sin embargo, nunca llega a alejarse de él. Pensaba que yo estaba mal de la cabeza, pero no. Ese bote de hojalata debe estar peor todavía si es incapaz de elegir entre la vida y la muerte».
languages.original_text: "He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

traits.locale_text: «De hecho, está jugando con la muerte, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Quiere atraparla, pero ella es más rápida y escapa de sus manos. Sin embargo, nunca llega a alejarse de él. Pensaba que yo estaba mal de la cabeza, pero no. Ese bote de hojalata debe estar peor todavía si es incapaz de elegir entre la vida y la muerte».

languages.text: « Dans les faits, il joue avec la mort, Votre Seigneurie. Il cherche à l'attraper, mais elle lui échappe et tourne autour de lui, sans jamais réellement s'éloigner. Moi qui pensais ne plus avoir toute ma raison, ce grille-pain a clairement bien plus de problèmes s'il n'est même pas capable de décider s'il veut vivre ou mourir. »
languages.original_text: "He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

traits.locale_text: « Dans les faits, il joue avec la mort, Votre Seigneurie. Il cherche à l'attraper, mais elle lui échappe et tourne autour de lui, sans jamais réellement s'éloigner. Moi qui pensais ne plus avoir toute ma raison, ce grille-pain a clairement bien plus de problèmes s'il n'est même pas capable de décider s'il veut vivre ou mourir. »

languages.text: "Aslında ölümle oynuyor {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Ölümü yakalamaya çalışıp duruyor ancak ölüm ondan kaçıyor ve ellerinin ucundan kurtulup gidiyor. Tabii ki onu asla tamamen terk etmeyecek. Ben kafayı yediğimi sanırdım ama hayır, yaşamakla ölmek arasında kararsızlık yaşıyorsa o tenekenin benden daha büyük sorunları olmalı."
languages.original_text: "He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

traits.locale_text: "Aslında ölümle oynuyor {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Ölümü yakalamaya çalışıp duruyor ancak ölüm ondan kaçıyor ve ellerinin ucundan kurtulup gidiyor. Tabii ki onu asla tamamen terk etmeyecek. Ben kafayı yediğimi sanırdım ama hayır, yaşamakla ölmek arasında kararsızlık yaşıyorsa o tenekenin benden daha büyük sorunları olmalı."

languages.text: "Tatsächlich spielt er mit dem Tod, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Er versucht, ihn einzufangen, aber er läuft immer wieder davon und schwebt über ihm, aber er wird ihn niemals ganz verlassen. Ich dachte, ich spinne, aber diese Blechdose muss größere Probleme als ich haben, wenn er sich nicht entscheiden kann, ob er leben oder sterben möchte."
languages.original_text: "He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

traits.locale_text: "Tatsächlich spielt er mit dem Tod, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Er versucht, ihn einzufangen, aber er läuft immer wieder davon und schwebt über ihm, aber er wird ihn niemals ganz verlassen. Ich dachte, ich spinne, aber diese Blechdose muss größere Probleme als ich haben, wenn er sich nicht entscheiden kann, ob er leben oder sterben möchte."

languages.text: 「彼は死と戯れているのです、実際には、御{mf|御殿|御嬢}様。彼は死を捕まえようとしますが、死は彼から逃げて、彼の肩の上を飛び去ります。しかし、死は決して彼を完全に去ることはありません。私は頭がおかしくなったのかと思いましたが、いや、死と生を決められないのなら、その缶詰は私よりも大きな問題を抱えているのでしょう」
languages.original_text: "He is playing with death, in fact, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. He keeps trying to catch it, but it runs away from him, and flies over his shoulder, but it will never leave him completely. I thought I was cracked in the head, but no, that tin can must have bigger problems than me, if he can't decide whether to live or die."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は死と戯れているのです、実際には、御{mf|御殿|御嬢}様。彼は死を捕まえようとしますが、死は彼から逃げて、彼の肩の上を飛び去ります。しかし、死は決して彼を完全に去ることはありません。私は頭がおかしくなったのかと思いましたが、いや、死と生を決められないのなら、その缶詰は私よりも大きな問題を抱えているのでしょう。」
